subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Most Great Name, and glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الاعظم و سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
